Amplify chunk sizes: normal=2000, firstRetry=1000, secondRetry=200.
Amplify retry order: secondRetry (762→772) before firstRetry (761→771) before normal (750→751). RoundRobin with priority.
Amplify strategy selection: EboksStrategies enum — NoEboks=0, EboksAll=1, SmsFirst=2, EboksFirst=3.
CVR recipients use Type=V (company). Amplify recipients use Type=KP (no first name) or KFP (with first name from owner name stripping ' (Ejer)' suffix and taking everything before last space).
Document encoding MUST be ISO-8859-1 (Latin1). HTML is base64-encoded before transmission.
EboksMessage GUID is item.Data.Guid if present, else Guid.NewGuid(). GUID is stable across retry — used as idempotency key in URL.
In test mode: no HTTP call, no statistic creation, NextStatus from shuffled result array.
MarkSmsGroupsSentAsync is called after batch completes — only for workloads where NextStatus is terminal (802/803 for CVR, 752/753 for Amplify).
Parallel dispatch: MaxDegreeOfParallelism=15 (both CVR and Amplify processors).
Status updates are written via IWorkloadStatusWriter after batch — not per-message.
XML namespace MUST be urn:eboks:en:3.0.0. Declaration: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>.
if truly empty (use empty list, not null).
must be plain English or well-known identifiers.
